summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No PR has complete merge preflight proof in the hydrated artifact, so no merge action is recommended. Four PRs are independent maintainer-review candidates; #90864 needs maintainer/author-follow-up handling because live labels show it is waiting on author.

actions.reason: Independent focused feature/docs PR, but not merge-ready for Clownfish recommendation without complete merge preflight.
Independent focused bug-fix PR, but merge recommendation is blocked by missing complete merge preflight proof.
Independent scoped diagnostic PR. The diff is larger than the other shard items and should stay in maintainer review until complete merge preflight exists.
Independent SMS channel bug-fix PR. Despite passing security-shaped checks, the PR changes command authorization flow and should not be merged without complete merge preflight.
The PR is explicitly waiting on author in live labels, which is a job-level human gate. Do not merge, replace, or close from this plan without refreshed author-follow-up context.

needs_human: #90864 is labeled waiting on author; comments are not hydrated, so maintainer judgment or refreshed hydration is needed to determine whether the author-follow-up gate is resolved.
